description:
Advances: mutagen.coverage

## Symptom
When two scenarios in the same BEAM cite the same `*_test.exs` file, the
SECOND scenario's coverage phase runs zero tests. Currently observed in the
EndToEndTest suite where Scenarios 3c and 3d both cite
`test/lane_fixture/withblock_test.exs`. Production callers running a single
`mix mutagen` invocation per BEAM are unaffected; this is a multi-invocation
hazard.

## Root cause
Same mechanism as mutagen-wrd.37: `MutagenEx.CoverageRunner.load_test_files/1`
calls `Code.require_file/1`, which is one-shot per path in a BEAM lifetime.
After the first scenario, the second `Code.require_file/1` on the same path
is a cached no-op, the `use ExUnit.Case` `__after_compile__` hook does NOT
re-fire, and `ExUnit.Server`'s registry stays empty for coverage's
`ExUnit.run/0`. Coverage records zero covered lines → enumerator produces
zero sites → the test relies on a `CoverageCollaborator` stub that prepends
`Code.compile_file/1` to mask the gap.

## Why this is filed separately from mutagen-wrd.37
mutagen-wrd.37's "Allowed touches" did not include
`lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex`. The wrd.37 fix landed for the baseline
phase only and explicitly noted (in `BaselineCollaborator` / `CoverageCollaborator`
docstrings in `test/mutagen_ex/end_to_end_test.exs`) that the coverage half
of the hazard remains.

## Fix
Symmetric with wrd.37: thread a `:test_modules` payload (derived from
`MutagenEx.TestModuleDiscovery.discover/1`) into `CoverageRunner.run/1`,
add a `:ex_unit_server` seam (default `MutagenEx.Test.ExUnitServer`), and
call `server.add_module(mod, cfg)` per cited module before
`ExUnit.run/0`. Mirror what `MutagenEx.Baseline` now does and what
`MutationLoop` has always done per site.

## Allowed touches
- `lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex`
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` (pass `test_modules` to coverage input)
- `test/mutagen_ex/end_to_end_test.exs` (retire `CoverageCollaborator` once
  the production path is correct)
- `test/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner_test.exs` (add unit coverage for the
  new seam)
- `.spec/specs/coverage.spec.md` (update the relevant requirement to
  document the explicit re-registration)
- `.spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md` (r10 already references this;
  may want a forward-link to coverage's requirement)

## Verification
- New `coverage_runner_test.exs` test pinning the re-registration seam is
  called per `:test_modules` entry before `ExUnit.run/0`.
- Once `CoverageRunner` does its own registration, the
  `CoverageCollaborator` in `EndToEndTest` becomes redundant and is
  retired; `run_pipeline!/1`'s dispatch switches to
  `MutagenEx.CoverageRunner` directly. Scenarios 3c and 3d continue to
  pass (the in-suite repeated `withblock_test.exs` citation no longer
  needs the `Code.compile_file/1` workaround).
title: [BUG] Coverage phase silently runs zero tests on repeated cited-file scenarios (require_file cache collision symmetric to wrd.37)
